title: The Weekly Closeout: Another entertainment exec at Gap Inc., and tariff refunds trickle in
description: The apparel conglomerate beefed up its "fashiontainment" roster, while retailers are getting their money back on import levies canceled by the Supreme Court.
title_en: Gap Inc. Expands Entertainment Leadership for 'Fashiontainment' Strategy as Tariff Refunds Begin
summary_ko: Gap Inc.가 '패션테인먼트' 전략 강화를 위해 엔터테인먼트 업계 임원을 영입했습니다. 소매업체들이 대법원이 취소한 수입 관세에 대한 환급을 받기 시작했습니다. 패션과 엔터테인먼트 융합 트렌드가 계속되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Gap Inc. strengthened its 'fashiontainment' strategy by recruiting entertainment industry executives. Retailers are beginning to receive refunds on import tariffs canceled by the Supreme Court. This demonstrates the ongoing trend of fashion and entertainment convergence.
so_what_ko: 패션 브랜드가 엔터테인먼트 요소를 강화하는 트렌드는 D2C 브랜드도 콘텐츠 마케팅과 브랜드 스토리텔링에 더 투자해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The trend of fashion brands strengthening entertainment elements suggests D2C brands should also invest more in content marketing and brand storytelling.
key_points: Gap Inc. hired entertainment executive for fashiontainment strategy
Retailers receiving tariff refunds from Supreme Court decision
Fashion-entertainment convergence trend continues
one_line_insight_ko: 패션 브랜드의 엔터테인먼트 전략 강화는 브랜드 차별화의 새로운 방향을 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Fashion brands' entertainment strategy enhancement presents a new direction for brand differentiation.

title: Department stores losing market share to resale
description: Off-price retailers have little to fear from rapidly growing secondhand sales, though, according to research from Bank of America analysts.
title_en: Department Stores Lose Market Share to Growing Resale Market While Off-Price Retailers Remain Safe
summary_ko: 백화점들이 급성장하는 중고품 리세일 시장에 시장 점유율을 빼앗기고 있습니다. 하지만 뱅크오브아메리카 분석에 따르면 오프프라이스 리테일러들은 중고품 판매 성장에도 큰 영향을 받지 않을 것으로 예상됩니다. 소비자들의 가격 민감도가 높아지면서 리테일 지형이 변화하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Department stores are losing market share to the rapidly growing resale secondhand market. However, Bank of America analysis suggests off-price retailers will not be significantly impacted by secondhand sales growth. The retail landscape is shifting as consumers become more price-sensitive.
so_what_ko: 중고품 시장 성장은 D2C 브랜드가 제품 내구성과 재판매 가치를 고려한 설계, 그리고 자체 중고품 프로그램 도입을 검토해야 함을 의미합니다.
so_what_en: The growth of the resale market means D2C brands should consider product durability and resale value in design, as well as introducing their own secondhand programs.
key_points: Department stores losing share to resale market
Off-price retailers relatively unaffected by secondhand growth
Consumer price sensitivity driving retail landscape changes
one_line_insight_ko: 중고품 시장 성장은 전통 소매업체에 위협이지만 오프프라이스 모델은 상대적으로 안전합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Resale market growth threatens traditional retailers but off-price models remain relatively safe.

title: Bed Bath & Beyond’s first co-branded store with The Container Store will open Saturday
description: The location in Fort Worth, Texas, comes just over a month after Bed Bath & Beyond announced plans to acquire the organizational retailer.
title_en: Bed Bath & Beyond Opens First Co-Branded Store with The Container Store Following Acquisition Plans
summary_ko: Bed Bath & Beyond가 The Container Store와의 첫 공동 브랜드 매장을 텍사스주 포트워스에 토요일 오픈합니다. 이는 Bed Bath & Beyond가 정리용품 리테일러 인수 계획을 발표한 지 한 달여 만입니다. 두 브랜드의 시너지를 통한 새로운 리테일 모델을 시도합니다.
summary_en: Bed Bath & Beyond is opening its first co-branded store with The Container Store in Fort Worth, Texas, this Saturday. This comes just over a month after Bed Bath & Beyond announced plans to acquire the organizational retailer. The companies are attempting a new retail model through brand synergy.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 인수 후 공동 매장 전략은 D2C 기업이 확장 시 파트너십을 통한 물리적 진출 방안을 제시하며, 상호 보완적 제품군 결합의 가능성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Post-acquisition co-store strategy suggests D2C companies can consider partnership-based physical expansion and demonstrates the potential of combining complementary product lines.
key_points: First Bed Bath & Beyond and Container Store co-branded location opening
Follows acquisition announcement from over a month ago
Testing new retail model through brand synergy
one_line_insight_ko: 인수 후 공동 매장 운영은 브랜드 시너지를 통한 새로운 리테일 모델의 가능성을 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Post-acquisition co-store operations present possibilities for new retail models through brand synergy.

title: Amazon Business rolls out new credit cards with U.S. Bank and Mastercard
description:
Amazon.com Inc. is updating its business credit card program, shifting new applicants to U.S. Bank and Mastercard as it adds more rewards and financing tools for business buyers. The retailer introduced the new Prime Business Card and Amazon Business Card on May 13. The launch moves new applicants away from American Express, which had issued […]
The post Amazon Business rolls out new credit cards with U.S. Bank and Mastercard appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Amazon Business Launches New Credit Cards with U.S. Bank and Mastercard, Adds Enhanced Rewards
summary_ko: 아마존이 비즈니스 신용카드 프로그램을 업데이트하며 새 신청자를 U.S. Bank와 마스터카드로 전환했습니다. 5월 13일 출시된 새로운 Prime Business Card와 Amazon Business Card는 더 많은 리워드와 금융 도구를 제공합니다. 기존 American Express에서 벗어나 새로운 파트너십을 구축했습니다.
summary_en: Amazon updated its business credit card program, shifting new applicants to U.S. Bank and Mastercard. The new Prime Business Card and Amazon Business Card launched on May 13 offer enhanced rewards and financing tools. This moves away from the previous American Express partnership.
so_what_ko: 아마존의 비즈니스 고객 대상 금융 서비스 강화는 D2C 기업들도 고객 충성도 제고를 위한 금융 상품이나 결제 솔루션 개발을 고려해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Amazon's enhanced financial services for business customers suggests D2C companies should consider developing financial products or payment solutions to increase customer loyalty.
key_points: Amazon switched business card partnership from Amex to U.S. Bank/Mastercard
New cards offer enhanced rewards and financing tools
Targets business buyers with improved benefits
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존의 비즈니스 금융 서비스 강화는 B2B 고객 락인 전략의 진화를 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon's enhanced business financial services show the evolution of B2B customer lock-in strategies.

title: Parts Town updates PartPredictor with new AI-backed features
description:
Parts Town has upgraded its AI-powered PartPredictor tool with expanded coverage of 120 brands featuring over 18,000 equipment models. The expansion will allow technicians and dispatchers to identify the correct parts faster using everything from model numbers to plain-language symptom descriptions. The distributor — which handles original equipment manufacturer (OEM) parts for food service; heating, […]
The post Parts Town updates PartPredictor with new AI-backed features appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Parts Town Enhances AI-Powered PartPredictor Tool with 120 Brands and 18,000 Equipment Models
summary_ko: Parts Town이 AI 기반 PartPredictor 도구를 업그레이드하여 120개 브랜드와 18,000개 이상의 장비 모델을 지원합니다. 이번 확장으로 기술자와 디스패처들이 모델 번호부터 일반 언어 증상 설명까지 활용해 올바른 부품을 더 빠르게 식별할 수 있습니다. 푸드서비스 및 HVAC OEM 부품을 취급하는 유통업체입니다.
summary_en: Parts Town upgraded its AI-powered PartPredictor tool to support 120 brands and over 18,000 equipment models. This expansion allows technicians and dispatchers to identify correct parts faster using everything from model numbers to plain-language symptom descriptions. The distributor handles OEM parts for food service and HVAC industries.
so_what_ko: AI를 활용한 제품 식별 도구의 발전은 D2C 기업들이 고객 서비스와 제품 추천에 자연어 처리 AI를 도입하여 고객 경험을 개선할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: The advancement of AI-powered product identification tools shows D2C companies can improve customer experience by implementing natural language processing AI in customer service and product recommendations.
key_points: AI tool now covers 120 brands and 18,000+ equipment models
Supports natural language symptom descriptions for part identification
Faster part identification for technicians and dispatchers
one_line_insight_ko: 자연어 처리를 통한 AI 제품 식별 기술은 고객 서비스 효율성을 대폭 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI product identification technology through natural language processing can significantly improve customer service efficiency.

title: Albertsons uses Google Cloud for new supply chain tool
description:
Albertsons Companies Inc. will deploy a computer vision tool at its distribution centers to help quality inspectors evaluate fresh produce before it ships to stores, it announced on May 13. The grocer said its patent-pending Intelligent Quality Control tool uses artificial intelligence (AI) to assist inspectors, and is already active in some distribution centers. Albertsons […]
The post Albertsons uses Google Cloud for new supply chain tool appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Albertsons deploys AI-powered quality control for fresh produce using Google Cloud
summary_ko: 알버트슨스가 구글 클라우드와 협력해 유통센터에 AI 기반 농산물 품질 관리 시스템을 구축했습니다. 이 특허출원 중인 컴퓨터 비전 기술은 매장 배송 전 신선 농산물 검사를 지원합니다. 이미 일부 유통센터에서 운영 중이며 품질 검사관의 업무를 보조하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Albertsons has partnered with Google Cloud to deploy an AI-powered quality control system at its distribution centers. The patent-pending computer vision tool uses artificial intelligence to assist quality inspectors in evaluating fresh produce before shipment to stores. The system is already operational in some distribution centers, supporting inspectors' work.
so_what_ko: 식료품 유통업체의 AI 활용이 공급망 운영 효율성과 품질 관리 수준을 크게 향상시킬 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how AI can significantly enhance supply chain efficiency and quality control for grocery retailers.
key_points: Patent-pending AI quality control tool for fresh produce inspection
Google Cloud partnership for computer vision technology
Already operational in select distribution centers
Assists quality inspectors rather than replacing them
one_line_insight_ko: AI 컴퓨터 비전 기술이 식료품 유통의 품질 관리를 자동화하며 운영 효율성을 제고하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI computer vision is automating quality control in grocery distribution, enhancing operational efficiency.

title: How Chinese short dramas became AI content machines
description: In a dimly lit bedroom, a frightened young woman is thrown onto a bed by a tall, muscular man. He grabs her hand, and flame-like vines crawl across her body, fusing with her flesh. She levitates, then drops. A dragon-shaped tattoo appears across her chest. “Two months,” the man says. “Give me an heir, or…
title_en: Chinese short dramas leverage AI to become automated content production machines
summary_ko: 중국 단편 드라마 산업이 AI를 활용해 자동화된 콘텐츠 제작 시스템을 구축하고 있습니다. 이들은 AI 기술을 통해 대량의 짧은 형태 비디오 콘텐츠를 효율적으로 생산하고 있습니다. 이러한 변화는 엔터테인먼트 콘텐츠 제작 방식의 혁신적 변화를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: The Chinese short drama industry is using AI to build automated content production systems. These companies are leveraging AI technology to efficiently produce large volumes of short-form video content. This transformation demonstrates an innovative shift in entertainment content creation methods.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 콘텐츠 자동 생성 기술이 마케팅 콘텐츠 제작 비용과 시간을 대폭 절감할 수 있는 가능성을 제시합니다.
so_what_en: AI-powered content automation presents opportunities to significantly reduce marketing content production costs and timelines.
key_points: Chinese short drama industry adopting AI for content automation
Mass production of short-form video content using AI
Transformation of entertainment content creation methods
Potential for scaling content production efficiently
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 콘텐츠 자동 생성이 대량 마케팅 콘텐츠 제작의 새로운 패러다임을 제시하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered content automation is creating new paradigms for mass marketing content production.

title: Garnier taps ‘Love Island’ star to pitch hair ‘moose’ to next generation
description: The L'Oréal brand is using social chatter to tease a new campaign featuring TJ Palma, who misinterprets instructions around promoting hair mousse.
title_en: Garnier leverages Love Island star for next-gen hair product campaign targeting young consumers
summary_ko: 로레알 브랜드 가르니에가 '러브 아일랜드' 출연자 TJ 팔마를 기용한 새로운 캠페인을 선보입니다. 이 캠페인은 소셜 미디어 화제성을 활용해 차세대 소비자들에게 헤어 무스 제품을 홍보합니다. 브랜드는 젊은 세대와의 소통을 위해 소셜 인플루언서를 전략적으로 활용하고 있습니다.
summary_en: L'Oréal brand Garnier is launching a new campaign featuring Love Island star TJ Palma. The campaign leverages social media buzz to promote hair mousse products to next-generation consumers. The brand is strategically using social influencers to connect with younger demographics.
so_what_ko: 소셜 인플루언서를 활용한 타겟팅 마케팅이 젊은 소비자층 확보를 위한 핵심 전략임을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Social influencer-driven targeting demonstrates a key strategy for capturing younger consumer segments.
key_points: Garnier partners with Love Island reality TV star
Campaign targets next-generation consumers
Uses social media buzz for product promotion
Strategic influencer marketing for younger demographics
one_line_insight_ko: 전통 뷰티 브랜드들이 리얼리티 TV 스타를 통해 젊은 소비자와의 접점을 확대하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Traditional beauty brands are expanding touchpoints with young consumers through reality TV personalities.

title: Social insights fail to reach decision-makers: Here’s what the numbers say
description: Just 14% of social media professionals feel their organization is able to use social data properly.
title_en: Social media insights struggle to reach decision-makers, with only 14% utilizing data effectively
summary_ko: 소셜 미디어 전문가의 단 14%만이 자신의 조직이 소셜 데이터를 적절히 활용한다고 느끼고 있습니다. 대부분의 소셜 인사이트가 의사결정권자에게 전달되지 못하는 문제가 발생하고 있습니다. 이는 조직 내 데이터 활용과 커뮤니케이션 구조의 개선이 필요함을 시사합니다.
summary_en: Only 14% of social media professionals feel their organization properly utilizes social data. Most social insights are failing to reach decision-makers within organizations. This indicates a need for improved data utilization and communication structures within companies.
so_what_ko: 소셜 데이터의 전략적 활용을 위해 조직 내 데이터 거버넌스와 의사결정 프로세스 개선이 시급합니다.
so_what_en: Organizations urgently need to improve data governance and decision-making processes for strategic social data utilization.
key_points: Only 14% of social media professionals satisfied with data usage
Social insights failing to reach organizational decision-makers
Gap between data collection and strategic application
Need for improved internal communication structures
one_line_insight_ko: 소셜 데이터 수집과 전략적 활용 사이의 조직적 격차가 마케팅 효율성을 저해하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Organizational gaps between social data collection and strategic utilization are hindering marketing effectiveness.

title: The AI search shift changing B2B marketing metrics
description:
Website traffic is losing ground as the primary success metric while AI visibility and lead quality take center stage.
The post The AI search shift changing B2B marketing metrics appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI search transformation shifts B2B marketing metrics from traffic to lead quality and visibility
summary_ko: AI 검색 기술의 발전으로 B2B 마케팅 성과 지표가 변화하고 있습니다. 웹사이트 트래픽이 주요 성공 지표로서의 중요성을 잃고 있습니다. 대신 AI 가시성과 리드 품질이 새로운 핵심 성과 지표로 부상하고 있습니다.
summary_en: AI search technology advancements are transforming B2B marketing performance metrics. Website traffic is losing its importance as a primary success indicator. Instead, AI visibility and lead quality are emerging as new key performance indicators.
so_what_ko: AI 검색 환경에서 마케팅 성과 측정 방식을 재정의하고 리드 품질 중심의 KPI 체계 구축이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Marketing performance measurement needs redefinition for AI search environments, requiring lead quality-focused KPI frameworks.
key_points: Website traffic declining as primary B2B marketing metric
AI visibility becoming crucial performance indicator
Lead quality taking center stage in measurement
Fundamental shift in marketing success metrics
one_line_insight_ko: AI 검색 시대에는 트래픽보다 리드 품질과 AI 가시성이 마케팅 성공의 핵심 지표가 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: In the AI search era, lead quality and AI visibility are becoming more critical marketing success indicators than traffic.

title: The art of doing more with less: The new marketing operations stack
description:
Stop managing tools and start orchestrating outcomes. At the May MarTech Conference we discussed untangling the ‘AI spaghetti mess’ to move forward.
The post The art of doing more with less: The new marketing operations stack appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: The art of doing more with less: The new marketing operations stack
summary_ko: MarTech 컨퍼런스에서 'AI 스파게티 혼란'을 해결하고 성과 중심의 마케팅 운영을 논의했습니다. 도구 관리에서 벗어나 결과 오케스트레이션으로 전환해야 한다고 강조했습니다. 효율적인 마케팅 기술 스택 구축이 핵심 과제로 제시되었습니다.
summary_en: The MarTech Conference discussed solving the 'AI spaghetti mess' and moving toward outcome-focused marketing operations. The emphasis shifted from managing tools to orchestrating results. Building an efficient marketing technology stack was presented as a key challenge.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 복잡한 AI 마케팅 도구들을 통합하고 성과 중심의 마케팅 운영 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should integrate complex AI marketing tools and build outcome-focused marketing operations systems.
key_points: Moving from tool management to outcome orchestration
Addressing AI spaghetti mess in marketing operations
Focus on efficiency in marketing technology stacks
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅 기술 스택의 복잡성을 해결하고 성과 중심 운영으로 전환이 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing technology stack complexity needs to be solved with a shift to outcome-focused operations.

title: Why scaling creative is really a leadership challenge
description:
Automation can increase output, but creative effectiveness depends on operational discipline and strategic clarity.
The post Why scaling creative is really a leadership challenge appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Why scaling creative is really a leadership challenge
summary_ko: 창작 규모 확장이 리더십 도전 과제라는 관점을 제시했습니다. 자동화로 산출량은 늘릴 수 있지만, 창작 효과성은 운영 규율과 전략적 명확성에 달려있습니다. 기술보다 리더십과 조직 운영이 핵심 요소로 강조되었습니다.
summary_en: Scaling creative work is presented as a leadership challenge rather than a technical one. While automation can increase output, creative effectiveness depends on operational discipline and strategic clarity. Leadership and organizational operations are emphasized over technology as key factors.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 기반 창작 자동화를 도입할 때 기술보다 리더십과 운영 체계 구축에 우선순위를 둬야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should prioritize leadership and operational systems over technology when implementing AI-driven creative automation.
key_points: Creative scaling is fundamentally a leadership challenge
Automation increases output but not necessarily effectiveness
Operational discipline and strategic clarity are crucial
one_line_insight_ko: 창작 자동화의 성공은 기술보다 리더십과 운영 체계에 달려있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Success in creative automation depends more on leadership and operational systems than technology.

title: Marketplace Briefing: Why Amazon discontinued its AI-powered Rufus chatbot for Alexa shopping agent
description: Amazon replaced its Rufus chatbot with a new AI assistant called Alexa for Shopping this week as AI search becomes a bigger part of its online store.
title_en: Amazon discontinues AI-powered Rufus chatbot for Alexa shopping agent
summary_ko: 아마존이 AI 기반 Rufus 챗봇을 중단하고 새로운 Alexa for Shopping AI 어시스턴트로 교체했습니다. 이는 온라인 스토어에서 AI 검색이 더욱 중요한 역할을 하게 되면서 이루어진 변화입니다. 아마존의 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 전략 전환을 보여주는 사례입니다.
summary_en: Amazon discontinued its AI-powered Rufus chatbot and replaced it with a new Alexa for Shopping AI assistant. This change reflects AI search becoming a more important part of its online store operations. It demonstrates Amazon's strategic shift in AI shopping agent approach.
so_what_ko: AI 쇼핑 에이전트 기술이 빠르게 진화하고 있으며, LG D2C도 고객 쇼핑 경험 개선을 위한 AI 어시스턴트 전략을 지속 업데이트해야 합니다.
so_what_en: AI shopping agent technology is rapidly evolving, and LG D2C must continuously update its AI assistant strategy to improve customer shopping experiences.
key_points: Amazon replaced Rufus chatbot with Alexa for Shopping
AI search becoming central to online store operations
Demonstrates rapid evolution in AI shopping agents
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존의 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 전환은 이 분야의 빠른 기술 진화를 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon's AI shopping agent transition demonstrates rapid technological evolution in this space.

title: BNPL giants battle at Walmart
description: The retail behemoth swapped buy now, pay later provider Affirm for Klarna last year, but both BNPL companies say Walmart business is good.
summary_ko: 월마트가 작년에 BNPL 제공업체를 Affirm에서 Klarna로 교체했습니다. 하지만 두 BNPL 회사 모두 월마트와의 비즈니스가 좋다고 밝혔습니다. 대형 소매업체를 둘러싼 BNPL 업계의 경쟁이 치열해지고 있습니다.
summary_en: Walmart swapped its BNPL provider from Affirm to Klarna last year. However, both BNPL companies report that their Walmart business is performing well. Competition among BNPL providers for major retailers is intensifying.
so_what_ko: BNPL 결제 옵션이 D2C 브랜드의 핵심 차별화 요소가 되고 있으며, LG는 적절한 BNPL 파트너십 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: BNPL payment options are becoming key differentiators for D2C brands, and LG should develop appropriate BNPL partnership strategies.
key_points: Walmart switched from Affirm to Klarna for BNPL services
Both providers claim successful business with Walmart
Intensifying competition among BNPL providers for retail partnerships
one_line_insight_ko: BNPL 제공업체들이 대형 소매업체 파트너십을 놓고 치열한 경쟁을 벌이고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: BNPL providers are competing fiercely for major retailer partnerships.

title: Dive Deposits: Affirm’s AI stance runs counter to trend
description: While some fintechs are content to do more with less through AI, BNPL platform Affirm simply aims to do more, as its top execs eschew human layoffs in favor of artificial intelligence.
title_en: Affirm's AI stance runs counter to trend
summary_ko: Affirm은 AI를 통해 적은 인력으로 더 많은 일을 하려는 다른 핀테크와 달리, 단순히 더 많은 일을 하는 것을 목표로 합니다. Affirm 경영진은 AI 도입을 위한 인력 감축 대신 인공지능과 함께 일하는 방식을 선택했습니다. 이는 업계 트렌드와 반대되는 접근법입니다.
summary_en: Unlike other fintechs that aim to do more with less through AI, Affirm simply aims to do more. Affirm's executives chose to work alongside AI rather than reducing workforce for AI implementation. This approach runs counter to industry trends.
so_what_ko: AI 도입 시 인력 감축보다 협업을 통한 역량 확장 전략이 가능하며, LG D2C도 이러한 접근법을 고려할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI adoption strategies can focus on capability expansion through collaboration rather than workforce reduction, which LG D2C could consider.
key_points: Affirm chooses AI collaboration over workforce reduction
Counters industry trend of doing more with less
Focuses on capability expansion rather than cost cutting
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도입에서 인력 감축 대신 협업을 통한 역량 확장이 새로운 전략 옵션이 될 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Capability expansion through AI collaboration rather than workforce reduction can be an alternative strategic option.
